root.speaker: Pell
root.text: (half-turning) Mm. Mm. Was carrying it. Was almost done.

task.speaker: Pell
task.text: Was bringing the lantern down. Down to the south gate. Was almost there. Mm.

done.speaker: Pell
done.text: (does not look up) The morning is long. The morning is long.

root.speaker: Aelis
root.text: (half-turning) Mm. Mm. Was carrying it. Was almost done.

task.speaker: Aelis
task.text: Was counting the reeds. Counted to a thousand. Was meant to count further. Mm.

done.speaker: Aelis
done.text: (does not look up) The morning is long. The morning is long.

root.speaker: Brennan
root.text: (half-turning) Mm. Mm. Was carrying it. Was almost done.

task.speaker: Brennan
task.text: Was holding the rope. The other end was held. Then it was not. Was still holding. Mm.

done.speaker: Brennan
done.text: (does not look up) The morning is long. The morning is long.

root.speaker: Olwy
root.text: (half-turning) Mm. Mm. Was carrying it. Was almost done.

task.speaker: Olwy
task.text: Was watching for the morning. Watched a long time. The morning is long. Mm.

done.speaker: Olwy
done.text: (does not look up) The morning is long. The morning is long.

props.message:
This place is full of veterans.

Walk softly.

The Maker is a kind weaver,
and her threads sometimes fray.

Walk softly. Walk past.

props.open_message: A small spark of warmth, kept dry inside the old wood. The fog seems thinner where you stand.
